initialSetupPage.title: Initial Setup
initialSetupPage.@title: Title for initial setup page. This covers the entire first-time configuration flow, including preferences, server selection, and account setup.

content.title: Personalization
content.subtitle: Adjust theme, language and interface options

nav.title: Server
nav.subtitle: Select the server
nav.prerequisiteStepIncomplete: Please select a server and test the connection first

content.title: Server Selection
content.subtitle: Select a server to connect to and access your data

decorativeAnimation.title: Almost there!
decorativeAnimation.subtitle: Let's get everything set up for you
decorativeAnimation.@title: Title shown in the decorative animation on the initial setup page, step-independent. Not shown in smaller screens.
decorativeAnimation.@subtitle: Subtitle shown in the decorative animation on the initial setup page. Not shown in smaller screens.

confirmProgramExitDialog.title: Confirm Exit
confirmProgramExitDialog.@title: The title displayed in the confirmation dialog when the user tries to close the application.
confirmProgramExitDialog.message: Are you sure you want to exit? Unsaved changes may be lost.
confirmProgramExitDialog.@message: The body text of the exit confirmation dialog.
confirmProgramExitDialog.@backupCheckbox: Label for the checkbox to trigger a data backup on exit.
confirmProgramExitDialog.@cancelButton: Secondary button text to stay in the app and not close.
confirmProgramExitDialog.@confirmButton: Primary button text to confirm closing the application.

check.title: Verify compatibility
check.subtitle: Verify the server is reachable before continuing.

localNetworkDiscovery.tooltip: Detect servers available on local network
localNetworkDiscovery.discoveredServerPrompt: Select a server found on your local network.

doneScanning.title: No servers found
doneScanning.subtitle:
We scanned your local network but did not find
any $appName servers

troubleshootingTips.title: What you can do:
troubleshootingTips.serverNotRunning: Make sure your server is running
troubleshootingTips.sameNetwork: Check that your device is on the same network as the server
troubleshootingTips.manualEntry: Or enter your server address manually

hostServerGuideButton.tooltip: Learn how to set up and host a server
hostServerGuideButton.label: How to host a server

stillScanning.title: Scanning your network...
stillScanning.subtitle:
Scanning for $appName servers on your local network.
This may take a few moments.

textField.label: Server URL
textField.helper: Enter the URL of your server
textField.infoTooltip: Can be provided by a service administrator or self-hosted.

workInProgress.title: Under Construction!
workInProgress.subtitle: Watch your step! We are still laying down the code for this feature. Check back soon!

themeMode.title: Theme Mode
themeMode.subtitle: Select dark, light or system theme

useSystemColors.title: Inherit System Colors
useSystemColors.subtitle: Automatically adapt to the system colors

useCustomAccentColor.title: Custom Accent Color
useCustomAccentColor.subtitle: Customize the accent color of the app theme

sendCrashReports.title: Send Crash Reports
sendCrashReports.subtitle: Help Improve $appName by sending anonymous crash reports
